mapper.select: SELECT file_dtl_seq, file_seq, file_nm, file_path, file_type, del_yn, sort_seq, rgst_user_seq, rgst_date_time::timestamp AS rgst_date_time, upt_user_seq, upt_date_time::timestamp AS upt_date_time FROM tb_file_dtl WHERE file_seq = #{fileSeq} AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY sort_seq

SELECT file_dtl_seq, file_seq, file_nm, file_path, file_type, del_yn, sort_seq, rgst_user_seq, rgst_date_time::timestamp AS rgst_date_time, upt_user_seq, upt_date_time::timestamp AS upt_date_time FROM tb_file_dtl WHERE file_dtl_seq = #{fileDtlSeq} AND del_yn = 'N'
select COUNT(*) FROM tb_file where file_seq = #{fileSeq}
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_FILE_DTL SET sort_seq = #{sortSeq}, upt_user_seq = #{uptUserSeq}, upt_date_time = NOW() WHERE 1=1
AND file_dtl_seq = #{fileDtlSeq}
UPDATE TB_FILE SET use_yn = 'N', upt_user_seq = #{uptUserSeq}, upt_date_time = NOW() WHERE file_seq = #{fileSeq}
